title: Bridge Essay: The neuroscience of musical improvisation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**The neuroscience of musical improvisation.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2015). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2015.01.004. PMID: 25601088. Researchers have recently begun to examine the neural basis of musical improvisation, one of the most complex forms of creative behavior. The emerging field of improvisation neuroscience has implications not only for the study of artistic expertise, but also for understanding the neural underpinnings of domain-general processes such as motor control and language production.
